description: Register an SFTP resource for reading and writing files over SSH

resource_key.label: Resource Key
resource_key.description: Key used to register this resource.

password_env_var.label: Password Env Var
password_env_var.description: Environment variable holding the SSH password

private_key_env_var.label: Private Key Env Var
private_key_env_var.description: Environment variable holding the SSH private key PEM string

private_key_path.label: Private Key Path
private_key_path.description: Path to SSH private key file on disk

name: SFTP Resource
